key.name: wallpaper-dir
key.description: The directory to load wallpaper images from. If empty, defaults to ~/Pictures/Wallpapers.

key.name: interval
key.description: Interval in seconds between automatic wallpaper changes. Default is 900 (15 minutes).

key.name: icon-position
key.description: Position of the panel icon: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.
